docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.source: 本地 CLI-only：只启动 CLI，不启动平台和 Cron
docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.translation: Local CLI-only: start CLI only, without platforms and Cron

docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.source: Linux/headless 服务模式：不启动 CLI，启动已启用平台和 Cron
docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.translation: Linux/headless service mode: do not start CLI, start enabled platforms and Cron

docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.source: 完整前台：CLI + 已启用平台 + Cron
docs/getting-started.md:code-comment:bas.translation: Full foreground: CLI + enabled platforms + Cron

docs/getting-started.md:heading:0fbaf458.source: 模型不可用或名称不对

docs/getting-started.md:heading:ae18eba8.translation: Do not want to enable tools by default

docs/getting-started.md:heading:eb7300ef.source: 启动时报 API Key 缺失
docs/getting-started.md:heading:eb7300ef.translation: API Key missing error during startup

docs/getting-started.md:list:04cc698eb3c.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__：小幅滚动聊天输出；__ELBOT_CODE_2__ / __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 滚动通知区。
docs/getting-started.md:list:04cc698eb3c.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__: Scroll chat output slightly; __ELBOT_CODE_2__ / __ELBOT_CODE_3__: Scroll notification area.

docs/getting-started.md:list:09d2cb55947.source: copy mode 中可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 与 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 移动，__ELBOT_CODE_2__ / __ELBOT_CODE_3__ 选择，__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 复制，__ELBOT_CODE_5__ 搜索，__ELBOT_CODE_6__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_7__ 返回输入。
docs/getting-started.md:list:09d2cb55947.translation: In copy mode, use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to move, __ELBOT_CODE_2__ / __ELBOT_CODE_3__ to select, __ELBOT_CODE_4__ to copy, __ELBOT_CODE_5__ to search, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__ or __ELBOT_CODE_7__ to return to input.

docs/getting-started.md:list:0a7039e0c4d.source: 可以启动后用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 刷新模型列表。
docs/getting-started.md:list:0a7039e0c4d.translation: You can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to refresh the model list after starting.

docs/getting-started.md:list:1c58540749e.source: 系统环境变量或配置目录 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是否包含对应 Key。
docs/getting-started.md:list:1c58540749e.translation: Whether the system environment variables or the configuration directory __ELBOT_CODE_0__ contain the corresponding Key.

docs/getting-started.md:list:2ceebaa4be6.source: 当前 shell 是否能读取这些环境变量。
docs/getting-started.md:list:2ceebaa4be6.translation: Whether the current shell can read these environment variables.

docs/getting-started.md:list:43c75801d01.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ View the list of available models.

docs/getting-started.md:list:674118ffe7b.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 切到可使用工具的工作模式。
docs/getting-started.md:list:674118ffe7b.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ Switch to work mode where tools can be used.

docs/getting-started.md:list:7616042ea6e.source: 平台配置目录，例如 Windows __ELBOT_CODE_0__，Linux XDG 配置目录。
docs/getting-started.md:list:7616042ea6e.translation: Platform configuration directory, such as Windows __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or Linux XDG configuration directory.

docs/getting-started.md:list:7dd7ed52504.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__：进入聊天区 / 通知区 copy mode。
docs/getting-started.md:list:7dd7ed52504.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ / __ELBOT_CODE_1__: Enter copy mode for chat area / notification area.

docs/getting-started.md:list:87c2c9b3c32.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 查看当前 Session、模型、上下文和请求状态。
docs/getting-started.md:list:87c2c9b3c32.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ View current Session, model, context, and request status.

docs/getting-started.md:list:87eb2129229.source: 一个 OpenAI-compatible LLM 服务，例如 DeepSeek、OpenAI 或其他兼容 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的服务。
docs/getting-started.md:list:87eb2129229.translation: An OpenAI-compatible LLM service, such as DeepSeek, OpenAI, or other services compatible with __ELBOT_CODE_0__.

docs/getting-started.md:list:b850706754b.source: 如果平台配置和源码示例配置都不存在，则自动生成平台默认配置。
docs/getting-started.md:list:b850706754b.translation: If neither the platform configuration nor the source example configuration exists, the platform default configuration will be automatically generated.

docs/getting-started.md:list:cf8e65e5c31.source: 可以启动后用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 或 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 刷新模型列表。
docs/getting-started.md:list:cf8e65e5c31.translation: After starting, you can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ or __ELBOT_CODE_1__ to refresh the model list.

docs/getting-started.md:list:e1ec1575bc4.source: 至少一个可用 API Key。
docs/getting-started.md:list:e1ec1575bc4.translation: At least one available API Key.

docs/getting-started.md:list:f4a5e6e2757.source: 如果平台配置不存在，则自动生成平台默认配置。
docs/getting-started.md:list:f4a5e6e2757.translation: If the platform configuration does not exist, the platform default configuration will be automatically generated.

docs/getting-started.md:list:fc54b80a323.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 名称是否被 Provider 支持。
docs/getting-started.md:list:fc54b80a323.translation: Whether the name __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is supported by the Provider.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:04e83a.source: 把 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 中的默认模式改为 chat：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:04e83a.translation: Change the default mode in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to chat:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:0e7bd9.translation: The default runtime model is specified in __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:101973.translation: During development, you can run it directly:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:1204a3.source: 如果使用其他 Provider，需要同步修改 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:1204a3.translation: If using other Providers, you need to synchronously modify __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:196b81.source: 如需使用临时配置文件，可以显式指定：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:196b81.translation: To use a temporary configuration file, you can specify it explicitly:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:1cd2a6.source: default_mode 手动设置，其他设置可以在cli中使用命令设置。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:1cd2a6.translation: `default_mode` is set manually; other settings can be configured using commands in the CLI.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:254c26.source: 推荐把密钥放在系统环境变量，或放在配置目录下的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 文件中，不要直接写进 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:254c26.translation: It is recommended to place keys in system environment variables or in the __ELBOT_CODE_0__ file under the configuration directory, rather than writing them directly into __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3b938d.source: 编译后的二进制如果找不到平台配置和源码示例配置，会在平台配置目录自动生成 __ELBOT_CODE_0__、__ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_5__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3b938d.translation: If the compiled binary cannot find the platform configuration or source example configuration, it will automatically generate __ELBOT_CODE_0__, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, and __ELBOT_CODE_5__ in the platform configuration directory.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3e97c8.source: 需要继续历史会话时，可用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_1__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:3e97c8.translation: When you need to continue a historical Session, you can use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ and __ELBOT_CODE_1__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4831bf.source: 运行数据默认进入平台数据目录，例如 SQLite、日志、sandbox 和 artifact。具体规则见 [配置说明](configuration.md)。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4831bf.translation: Runtime data is stored in the platform data directory by default, such as SQLite, logs, sandbox, and artifacts. For detailed rules, see [Configuration Instructions](configuration.md).

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4b9566.source: 自动模式下，Linux 如果检测到当前用户已有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 在运行，会进入本地 CLI-only，避免重复连接平台或重复运行 Cron；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:4b9566.translation: In automatic mode, if Linux detects that the current user already has __ELBOT_CODE_0__ running, it will enter local CLI-only mode to avoid duplicate platform connections or duplicate Cron executions;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:505a70.source: 直接运行源码时会使用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:505a70.translation: When running from source directly, __ELBOT_CODE_0__ will be used;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:56825f.source: 已有配置文件不会被覆盖。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:56825f.translation: Existing configuration files will not be overwritten.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:5e17c2.source: Windows 下如果使用 Git Bash，构建出的文件可能需要命名为 __ELBOT_CODE_0__：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:5e17c2.translation: On Windows, if using Git Bash, the built file may need to be named __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:6338ef.source: 否则进入完整前台模式。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:6338ef.translation: Otherwise, it will enter full foreground mode.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:677dc5.source: ElBot 默认读取 __ELBOT_CODE_0__，并通过其中的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 加载 __ELBOT_CODE_2__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_3__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:677dc5.translation: ElBot reads __ELBOT_CODE_0__ by default, and loads __ELBOT_CODE_2__ and __ELBOT_CODE_3__ via __ELBOT_CODE_1__ within it.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:6a372b.source: 默认运行态模型写在配置目录的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:6a372b.translation: The default runtime model is specified in __ELBOT_CODE_0__ of the configuration directory:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:7e7e1b.translation: The default runtime model is specified in __ELBOT_CODE_0__:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:8429e5.source: 运行数据默认进入平台数据目录，例如 SQLite、日志和 sandbox。具体规则见 [配置说明](configuration.md)。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:8429e5.translation: Runtime data is stored in the platform data directory by default, such as SQLite, logs, and sandbox. For specific rules, see [Configuration Instructions](configuration.md).

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:84e2b7.source: 本文档用于把 ElBot 跑起来，并完成第一次 CLI 对话。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:84e2b7.translation: This document is used to get ElBot up and running and complete your first CLI conversation.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9b0c11.source: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 是独立本地进程，会使用同一套配置和 SQLite 数据，但不会接管 service 进程中的当前请求、确认状态或内存里的当前 Session。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9b0c11.translation: __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is an independent local process that uses the same set of configurations and SQLite data, but it will not take over current requests, confirmation states, or the current Session in memory from the service process.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9c7907.source: 默认配置已经包含 DeepSeek 和 OpenAI Provider：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:9c7907.translation: The default configuration already includes DeepSeek and OpenAI Providers:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:a18886.source: 首次运行且平台配置目录没有 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 时，会在平台配置目录自动生成 __ELBOT_CODE_1__、__ELBOT_CODE_2__、__ELBOT_CODE_3__、__ELBOT_CODE_4__、__ELBOT_CODE_5__ 和 __ELBOT_CODE_6__；
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:a18886.translation: During the first run, if __ELBOT_CODE_0__ does not exist in the platform configuration directory, __ELBOT_CODE_1__, __ELBOT_CODE_2__, __ELBOT_CODE_3__, __ELBOT_CODE_4__, __ELBOT_CODE_5__, and __ELBOT_CODE_6__ will be automatically generated in the platform configuration directory;

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:aaa55b.source: 推荐把密钥放在系统环境变量，或把自动生成的 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 复制为配置目录下的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 后填写，不要直接写进 __ELBOT_CODE_2__。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:aaa55b.translation: It is recommended to place the keys in system environment variables, or copy the automatically generated __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to __ELBOT_CODE_1__ in the configuration directory before filling it in; do not write them directly into __ELBOT_CODE_2__.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:b43f86.source: 也可以用 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 按当前环境变量猜测 shell：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:b43f86.translation: You can also use __ELBOT_CODE_0__ to guess the shell based on current environment variables:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:b5f919.source: Windows 不做 service 检测，默认完整前台启动。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:b5f919.translation: Windows does not perform service detection and starts in full foreground mode by default.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:ca06fb.source: 启动后直接输入消息即可。默认示例中 __ELBOT_CODE_0__ 的 __ELBOT_CODE_1__ 是 __ELBOT_CODE_2__，会启用工具发现能力。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:ca06fb.translation: After starting, simply enter your message. In the default example, the __ELBOT_CODE_1__ of __ELBOT_CODE_0__ is __ELBOT_CODE_2__, which enables tool discovery capabilities.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:ccadb6.source: ElBot 可以生成常见 shell 的补全脚本：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:ccadb6.translation: ElBot can generate completion scripts for common shells:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f1ff6d.source: ElBot 默认按配置查找顺序读取主配置。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f1ff6d.translation: ElBot reads the main configuration by default according to the configuration lookup order.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f3f9d3.source: 如果已经在本仓库内，可以直接继续下一步。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f3f9d3.translation: If you are already in this repository, you can proceed directly to the next step.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f7a717.source: 然后在 Nushell 配置中 source 该文件。
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:f7a717.translation: Then source this file in your Nushell configuration.

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:fa23d8.source: 默认示例已经包含 DeepSeek 和 OpenAI Provider：
docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:fa23d8.translation: The default example already includes DeepSeek and OpenAI Providers:

docs/getting-started.md:paragraph:fed7a4.translation: For more commands, see [Command Quick Reference](commands.md).
